Reconcile delegated review receipts and closure next-step drift after autonomous boundary hardening

Under epic vida-stack-2d9.8, fix two freshly surfaced framework drifts from task closure: align subagent review artifacts/logging with actual delegated review evidence so empty review payloads are not treated as meaningful review completion, and reconcile terminal next-step handling so closure does not emit spurious next_step_unknown drift. Update nearest protocols/tests/task coverage as needed.
